headline: Is HAS Stock a Buy Now as Growth Improves but Valuation Stays Mixed?
summary: Hasbro's stronger 2026 growth and earnings momentum support the bull case, but mixed valuation and uneven margins keep the buy call measured.

headline: Hasbro Stock Outlook Hinges on Magic Growth and Margin Risks in 2026
summary: HAS' 2026 outlook rests on Magic-led growth, while tariffs, royalties and digital execution risks keep the turnaround story balanced.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Hasbro, Lowers Price Target to $111
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Christopher Horvers   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $125 to $111.

headline: DA Davidson Maintains Neutral on Hasbro, Lowers Price Target to $95
